description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the paddyhack/nikola Docker image and three stages: setup, compile, and build. In the setup stage add a theme-setup job that runs apk add --no-cache nodejs, then cd themes/bootstrap4/sass, then npm install --unsafe-perm, and stores the themes directory as an artifact. In the compile stage add a sass-compile job that runs apk add --no-cache ruby ruby-rdoc ruby-irb ca-certificates nodejs, gem install sass, nikola plugin --install=sass, nikola build -s prepare_sass_sources, and nikola build -s build_sass, and saves the output directory as an artifact. In the build stage add a build job that runs nikola build, saves the output directory as an artifact, and runs only on the master branch. Also add a build-test job that runs nikola build, belongs to the build stage, and runs on all branches except master.
